_purpose: Persona roster for Pulse mock mode. Backend reads this to (a) upsert User rows on POST /jobs/run-detection and (b) gate detection on `eligible_for_pulse`. Frontend reads this via GET /users to build the persona toggle. Anchored to ../../03-research-and-deck/problem-definition/personas.md.
_riya_is_the_control: Riya (demo-riya-003) fails criteria 1 and 2. She is included so the demo can visibly prove Pulse *does not* offer itself to users outside the target segment. Her /nudges/latest returns null and POST /jobs/run-detection records `skipped: not_eligible` in her per-user trace.

users.role: Senior product designer at a SaaS startup
users.why_eligible: Premium Individual for 3 years, listens every day, English-indie taste has collapsed to ~85% dream-pop across 8 weeks.
users.signature_quote: Every like feels like a vote that makes my world smaller.

users.role: Engineering manager at a mid-stage fintech
users.why_eligible: Premium Individual for 5 years, 6 days/week active, Telugu + Hindi + English mix has collapsed to ~91% Telugu across 8 weeks.
users.signature_quote: Spotify decided 'Telugu' was the signal, and now my Discover Weekly serves me Telugu film music.

users.why_ineligible: Free-tier account (Pulse is a Premium-only feature) AND new to Spotify (2 months tenure < 3-year target-segment threshold). Even if she upgraded today, her listening history is not long enough for the 3-week streak trigger to have anything to bite on.
